name: Forest Hills Country Club (Sir James Country Club)
designer: John William Rogers and Pichai Vichupas
notes: REGION NOTE: Forest Hills / Sir James Country Club is located in Muak Lek District, Saraburi province — NOT Kanchanaburi. It is grouped here per the original pipeline batch assignment but is geographically in the Khao Yai/Saraburi corridor, closer to Bangkok than true Kanchanaburi courses. Address: 195 Moo 3, Mitraphab Road, Tumbol Mitraphab, Muak Lek District, Saraburi 18180. HOLES: One source (Golfthailand.com) describes it as a 27-hole parkland course; 1golf.eu lists 18 holes. Golfdigg and Where2Golf also indicate 18 holes. The 27-hole figure from golfthailand.com may reflect a third 9 added later — used 27 as most detailed source but this should be verified on-site. GREEN FEES: 1golf.eu lists weekday THB 400 / weekend THB 1,200 — unusually wide spread, flagged for verification. Caddie mandatory per where2golf.com; tip of THB 400 also noted. Cart fee THB 500/cart per Golfdigg; THB 600/cart per Golfthailand. GPS (14.5886, 101.1933) from where2golf — plausible for Muak Lek, Saraburi. Distance 'less than 90 km from Bangkok' per golfthailand.com — estimated 150 km to clubhouse given Muak Lek location. Drive time ~90 mins per multiple sources. Resort has 119-room (or 145-room, sources differ) 4-star hotel. Named after Sir James Richard Holt, knighted 1977. Golf set rental THB 600; shoes THB 200; umbrella THB 100. Sources: golfasian.com, 1golf.eu, golfdigg.com, where2golf.com, golfthailand.com, birdie.in.th, hole19golf.com
